positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a fantastical celestial woodland. The scene features interwoven glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna, casting a soft, ethereal glow against deep indigo and midnight blue. Central composition focuses on a graceful, stylized silver moth resting on a moss-covered crystalline log. The overall aesthetic should be inspired by Art Nouveau and Japanese woodblock prints, utilizing clean silhouettes and strong, symbolic contrast (glow vs. dark). The style must be highly detailed, vector-like in its clean lines, with a rich, saturated color palette dominated by sapphire, emerald, and amethyst accents. Ideal for screen printing on dark apparel.
